claims.text: The taxonomy labels timeout, permission, and parse-error failures in 40 agent runs.
The paper reports a manual spot-check of 10 labels.
The taxonomy is not evaluated on browser automation tasks.

review_layers.text: The taxonomy has no manual spot-check, so label quality is unknown.
evidence: Paper claim text reports the item that the review says is absent.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer missed or discounted an explicit paper claim.
review_layers.next_action: Do not spend the next loop on this criticism.

review_layers.text: Browser automation failures are excluded from the evaluation.
evidence: Paper claim text marks this evaluation or comparison as missing.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: The missing evaluation can be turned into a bounded next-loop run.
review_layers.next_action: Run the missing evaluation or comparison named by the claim.

review_layers.text: The taxonomy should optimize GPU kernel performance.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer imported a requirement from a different task.
review_layers.next_action: Ignore for this loop unless the paper adds image inputs.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Run the missing evaluation or comparison named by the claim
selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
selected_experiment.verify: Run the missing evaluation or comparison named by the claim.
